rule_summary.default_pricing: fund NAV for the effective T day
rule_summary.query_timing_note: often T+2; depends on sales platform and fund type

sources.finding: Non-open-day subscription applications are postponed; shares are confirmed into the investor fund account on T+1.

sources.source_name: Tiantian Fund Help Center - What is T day
sources.finding: 15:00 is the T-day boundary; before 15:00 uses same-day NAV, after 15:00 uses next trading-day NAV; T+1 confirmation is described.
General fund redemption is T+1 working-day confirmation and T+2 query; arrival varies by fund type.

sources.source_name: Bank of China - Open-end fund subscription/redemption education
sources.finding: Same-day subscription/redemption applications can be revoked before 15:00; investors should read fund contract and prospectus for fee/rule details.
T-day application NAV is used for subscription-share calculation; shares are usually confirmed on T+1 working day; valid applications before trading-time end are treated as T day.
